judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual elements: a graph titled 'Atlas IIAS' with two nested contour shapes, a legend for '10^-5' and '10^-6', and axes for crossrange/downrange distance, but they differ on some quoted text and additional internal labels.
original_image_tags: A technical plot within a rectangular border. The plot title or legend area at the top left contains "Atlas IIAS" and "Mode 5 P_I". A legend indicates two contour lines: a dashed line labeled "10⁻⁵" and a dotted line labeled "10⁻⁶". The plot shows two nested, asymmetrical, roughly elliptical contour shapes centered near the origin (0,0), extending primarily in the positive downrange direction.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A plotted chart titled “Figure 18. Atlas IIAS Mode-5 Ship-Hit Contours with A = 3.45,” showing two dashed contour shapes on x-y axes labeled “Downrange Distance (nm)” and “Crossrange Distance (nm),” with annotations “Atlas IIAS,” “Mode 5 P1,” “10^-5,” “10^-6,” and “B = 1,000 / A = 3.45.”*
